lesson.menu_desc: Present Simple, Continuous & Past Simple -- 27 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 9 -- Review Block 1 -- Everything You Learned
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Carolina Paludetto Rodrigues | Aula 9 -- Review Block 1

listenings.text: Welcome back to class, and congratulations on finishing your first block. In the last eight lessons you made a lot of progress. You learned to talk about your daily routine, your school, your favorite things, and the sport you love. Two weeks ago you described a book you read, and last week you talked about a meal you had with your family. Today we play a review game. Every square on the board is a small challenge. Sometimes you talk about what you do every day. Sometimes you describe what you are doing right now. And sometimes you remember what you did in the past. Do not worry about a mistake. A mistake is part of the journey. Be proud of every skill you achieve. Now, roll the dice and let us begin.

Hi, this is Carolina, and this is my self-assessment for Block 1. When I started, I was very nervous, but now I feel more confident. Every day I study a little English, and right now I am reviewing all my notes for the game. My favorite lesson was the one about food, because I love to cook. Two weeks ago I read a short book in English, and that was a big challenge for me. I made some mistakes, but I learned from each one. I am proud of my progress, and I remember almost all the new words. My next goal is to speak faster and with fewer pauses. This journey is not always easy, but it is fun, and I want to achieve a lot more. Thank you for listening.

extra_audio.text: Carolina started her English journey eight weeks ago. Every day she studies new words at home. Right now she is reviewing all of Block 1. Last week she described a meal she had. Today she is proud of her progress.
